prompt: Write a 10-tweet launch thread for openpatent.ai. Each tweet must (a) be under 240 chars, (b) link to a numbered chapter of the launch story, (c) reference at least one of: 6-layer proof, Bitcoin OTS, $10 insurance, 10+ jurisdictions, BFT sovereign-temple, .ai domain portfolio, the canonical signature line. Tweet 1 must hook with the AI-idea-theft pain. Tweet 10 must end with the waitlist CTA. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {thread:[10 strings], signature:string}.
